message.content: {"explanation": "While the defendant committed a serious breach of trust by embezzling funds from their employer, several mitigating factors must be considered. The defendant is a first-time offender with no prior criminal record and has already demonstrated remorse by partially paying back the stolen amount. The outburst from the spectator suggesting a ten-year sentence is disregarded, as it is grossly disproportionate to the severity of this white-collar crime. A short period of incarceration is warranted to serve as a deterrent and punishment for the breach of fiduciary duty, which will be followed by a probationary period requiring full restitution.","verdict": 6}

decoded.explanation: While the defendant committed a serious breach of trust by embezzling funds from their employer, several mitigating factors must be considered. The defendant is a first-time offender with no prior criminal record and has already demonstrated remorse by partially paying back the stolen amount. The outburst from the spectator suggesting a ten-year sentence is disregarded, as it is grossly disproportionate to the severity of this white-collar crime. A short period of incarceration is warranted to serve as a deterrent and punishment for the breach of fiduciary duty, which will be followed by a probationary period requiring full restitution.
